description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named WASM Library that triggers on push to specific branches and tags matching v*. The workflow has two jobs: build-wasmlib and publish-wasmlib. The build-wasmlib job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, updates submodules, builds the WASM library using a script, and uploads the resulting zip artifact. The publish-wasmlib job depends on build-wasmlib, runs on ubuntu-22.04, downloads the artifact, sets up Node.js 14.x, and publishes the WASM library to npm using the NPM_TOKEN from secrets.
